problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
